info.name: VerveguardAPI
info.description: Verveguard Fraud Detection API - Complete collection based on controller integration tests

request.description: Login with email and password. Tokens are automatically saved to collection variables.
Refresh access token using refresh token
Get current merchant's profile (requires MERCHANT role)
Update merchant status and KYC status simultaneously
Create a card for current merchant (requires MERCHANT role)
Get account by card number (requires ADMIN)
Create a new tier configuration (requires TIER_UPDATE)
Get tier config by tier name (TIER_1, TIER_2, TIER_3)
Evaluate transaction for fraud (requires MERCHANT role)
Evaluate transaction for specific merchant (requires ADMIN)
